glosses.ja: 〜にかかっている; ぶらぶらする

sentences.target: Wir können später im Park abhängen.

translations.de: Wir können später im Park abhängen.
translations.en: We can hang out in the park later.
translations.es: Podemos pasar el rato en el parque más tarde.
translations.fr: On peut traîner au parc plus tard.
translations.it: Possiamo passare un po' di tempo al parco più tardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们待会儿去公园一起玩。
translations.yue: 我哋遲啲喺公園傾下計。
translations.ru: Мы можем позже потусоваться в парке.
translations.pt: Podemos dar uma volta no parque mais tarde.
translations.vi: Lát nữa mình ra công viên chơi.
translations.ar: يمكننا قضاء بعض الوقت في الحديقة لاحقًا.
translations.nl: We kunnen later in het park rondhangen.
translations.uk: Ми можемо пізніше погуляти в парку.
translations.hi: हम बाद में पार्क में घूम सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορούμε αργότερα να αράξουμε στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Vi kan henge i parken senere.
translations.id: Nanti kita bisa nongkrong di taman.
translations.sv: Vi kan hänga i parken senare.
translations.ro: Putem sta prin parc mai târziu.
translations.da: Vi kan hænge ud i parken senere.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary in V2 position; selects a bare infinitive (abhängen) and carries tense/person.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate; indicates time (later).
Preposition contracted from 'in dem'; governs dative and introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' and head of the PP.
Bare infinitive lexical verb selected by the modal; colloquial sense ‘to hang out’.

translations.en: It can depend on the weather.
translations.fr: Ça peut dépendre de la météo.
translations.he: זה יכול להיות תלוי במזג האוויר.
translations.vi: Nó có thể phụ thuộc vào thời tiết.
translations.nl: Dat kan van het weer afhangen.
translations.hi: यह मौसम पर निर्भर कर सकता है.
translations.el: Αυτό μπορεί να εξαρτάται από τον καιρό.
translations.nb: Det kan komme an på været.
translations.ja: それは天気次第かもしれない。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive pronoun filling the subject slot of the impersonal construction.
Finite modal auxiliary in V2 position; selects the bare infinitive 'abhängen'.
Preposition contracted from 'von dem'; governs dative; introduces the oblique complement expressing the source of dependence.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'vom'.
Bare infinitive lexical verb meaning ‘to depend’; head of the VP complement to the modal.

sentences.target: Ich will heute einfach nur abhängen.

translations.de: Ich will heute einfach nur abhängen.
translations.en: I just want to hang out today.
translations.es: Hoy solo quiero pasar el rato.
translations.vi: Hôm nay mình chỉ muốn thư giãn thôi.
translations.hi: आज बस मुझे आराम करना है.
translations.nb: I dag vil jeg bare slappe av.
translations.id: Hari ini aku cuma mau santai.
translations.sv: I dag vill jag bara ta det lugnt.
translations.ro: Azi vreau doar să mă relaxez.
translations.da: I dag vil jeg bare slappe af.
translations.ja: 今日はただのんびりしたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary expressing volition; selects a bare infinitive (abhängen).
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate; indicates the day.
Degree/manner adverb; attenuates or characterizes the manner (‘simply’).
Focus particle restricting scope (‘only/just’) over the VP.
Bare infinitive lexical verb selected by the modal; colloquial sense ‘to hang out’.

sentences.target: Er will die anderen beim Rennen abhängen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ vɪl diː ˈandəʁən baɪm ˈʁɛnən ˈapˌhɛŋən/

translations.de: Er will die anderen beim Rennen abhängen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ vɪl diː ˈandəʁən baɪm ˈʁɛnən ˈapˌhɛŋən/
translations.en: He wants to leave the others behind in the race.
translations.es: Quiere dejar a los demás atrás en la carrera.
translations.fr: Il veut distancer les autres dans la course.
translations.it: Vuole staccare gli altri nella gara.
translations.ko: 그는 경주에서 다른 사람들을 따돌리고 싶어 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他想在比赛中把其他人甩在身后。
translations.yue: 佢想喺比賽入面甩開其他人。
translations.ru: Он хочет оставить остальных позади в забеге.
translations.pt: Ele quer deixar os outros para trás na corrida.
translations.he: הוא רוצה להשאיר את האחרים מאחור במרוץ.
translations.vi: Anh ấy muốn bỏ xa những người khác trong cuộc đua.
translations.ar: هو يريد أن يترك الآخرين خلفه في السباق.
translations.nl: Hij wil de anderen in de race achter zich laten.
translations.uk: Він хоче залишити інших позаду в забігу.
translations.hu: Le akarja hagyni a többieket a versenyben.
translations.hi: वह दौड़ में दूसरों को पीछे छोड़ना चाहता है.
translations.pl: Chce zostawić innych w tyle w wyścigu.
translations.el: Θέλει να αφήσει τους άλλους πίσω στον αγώνα.
translations.nb: Han vil løpe fra de andre i løpet.
translations.id: Dia ingin meninggalkan yang lain di belakang dalam lomba.
translations.sv: Han vill lämna de andra bakom sig i loppet.
translations.ro: Vrea să-i lase pe ceilalți în urmă în cursă.
translations.cs: Chce v závodě ostatní nechat za sebou.
translations.da: Han vil løbe fra de andre i løbet.
translations.fi: Hän haluaa jättää muut kilpailussa taakse.
translations.ja: 彼はレースで他の人たちを引き離したい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary selecting a bare infinitive (abhängen).
Definite article determiner marking the noun phrase 'die anderen' as definite (plural, accusative in context).
Nominalized adjective functioning as a common noun (‘the others’); direct object (accusative plural) of 'abhängen'.
Preposition contracted from 'bei dem'; governs dative; introduces an adverbial PP of time/occasion.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'beim'.
Bare infinitive lexical verb; transitive sense ‘to outdistance/leave behind’ with accusative object.

app_payload.word_ja: 〜にかかっている; ぶらぶらする
jp: Wir können später im Park abhängen.
Ich will heute einfach nur abhängen.
Er will die anderen beim Rennen abhängen.

en: We can hang out in the park later.
It can depend on the weather.
I just want to hang out today.
He wants to leave the others behind in the race.
